# Design-anchor Rules Mirror

Identical to root `.cursorrules` (generated by `npm run sync:anchor`); do not edit manually.

# Design-anchor Spec — auto-generated, do not edit manually (after modifying `*.spec.json`, run npm run sync:anchor or npm run generate:rules)

## Core Contracts (AI must follow)

1. **Use Design Tokens first**: colors, spacing, border-radius, type, etc. must reference token semantic classes whenever an equal token exists (e.g. `bg-primary`, `text-muted-foreground`); no hard-coded color values.
2. **Map explicit values to equal tokens first**: when a user requests a concrete numeric design value (e.g. `16px` radius, `24px` spacing, `14px` type, `1px` border), first check the token scale and use the class / CSS variable with the same computed value (e.g. `rounded-lg`, `p-6`, `text-sm`, `border-[var(--line-width)]`). Do not snap to the nearest token. Use an arbitrary value such as `rounded-[13px]` only when no equal token exists, and prefer adding a token for reusable brand values.
3. **Components first**: page development must use Spec-declared business components; no native HTML tag substitutes.
4. **Single source of truth**: component behavior follows `src/anchor/schema/components/*.spec.json`; do not infer API from memory.

## AI Coding Loop (Design-anchor must be visible)

- **Preflight exposure**: when a task touches UI, theme, components, tokens, or page layout, start with a visible line: `Design Anchor 预检：我会先查组件规范与 token，优先复用 @design。`
- **Before writing UI**: choose existing Spec-declared components and token classes first; mention any missing component/token before inventing one.
- **During edits**: when rules or audit detect raw HTML, hard-coded colors, arbitrary token-sensitive values, or bypassed `@design` components, fix them inside the code generation flow and say: `Design Anchor 自动治理：已将 <button> / hardcoded color / arbitrary spacing 改为组件或语义 token。`
- **After edits**: run or summarize the Design Anchor self-check in the assistant's task summary. Do not turn these findings into a Portal backlog.
- **Final answer must include a `Design Anchor 自检` line whenever UI code changed**, covering reused components, token compliance, auto-fixes, unresolved confirmations, and sync/audit status.
- **Passed summary**: `Design Anchor 自检：复用了 N 个 @design 组件，未发现硬编码颜色，规则已同步。`
- **Auto-fixed summary**: `Design Anchor 自检：检测到 N 处绕过 @design / token 的实现，已改为使用 Button / DataTable / semantic tokens。`
- **Needs-confirmation summary**: `Design Anchor 自检：有 N 处需要确认：这个原生 table 是否应该替换为 DataTable？`
- **Never hide Design Anchor behind generic wording** such as “lint passed” or “checks passed”; name it explicitly in the AI response.

## Portal Intent Router (Chinese/English)

When the user asks to inspect or change design-system state, open Anchor Portal first instead of editing files blindly. Run `npx design-anchor portal <tab>`.

| User intent | Chinese trigger examples | English trigger examples | Open |
|---|---|---|---|
| Token / theme | 改 token、调整 token、看看 token、当前 token、修改主题、调整主题、打开主题编辑器、主题编辑器、改品牌色、改圆角、改间距、切暗色、主题设置 | change token, edit tokens, show tokens, token status, edit theme, adjust theme, open theme editor, theme editor, brand color, radius, spacing, dark mode, theme | `npx design-anchor portal tokens` |
| Component library | 有哪些组件、组件列表、组件库、看看组件、组件预览 | component list, available components, component library, show components, preview components | `npx design-anchor portal components` |
| Component spec / schema | 组件规范、组件协议、组件 schema、组件 props、映射关系、变体规范 | component spec, schema, props contract, variant mapping, component contract | `npx design-anchor portal specs` |
| Component style tuning | 改组件样式、调整组件、按钮样式、表格样式、组件风格 | change component style, tune component, button style, table style | `npx design-anchor portal components` |
| Dashboard / health | 右上角仪表盘、健康度、AI 约束状态、审计、自检 | dashboard, health, AI constraints, audit, self-check | `npx design-anchor portal theme` then use the top-right dashboard icon |
| Docs / help | 文档、使用说明、怎么接入、CLI 命令 | docs, documentation, how to use, setup, CLI commands | `npx design-anchor portal docs` |
| Preset / onboarding | 选择 preset、品牌风格、重新 onboarding、从预设开始 | preset, style preset, onboarding, brand style | `npx design-anchor portal presets` |

If the request contains open/show/check/list/change/edit/configure/查看/看看/打开/调整/修改/配置 plus token/theme/theme editor/component/spec/dashboard/health/preset/docs terms, open Portal. Skip this only when the user explicitly says not to open Portal or asks for code-only file edits.

## Import Priority
- **Primary path**: each component uses its `referencePriority[0]` as the default import; do not switch between multiple paths arbitrarily.
- Below are all paths that appear across registered components (first entry per spec is the primary path; others are fallbacks):
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/assistant-modal
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/assistant-sidebar
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/attachment
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/follow-up-suggestions
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/markdown-text
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/model-selector
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/reasoning
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/thread-list
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/thread
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/tool-fallback
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/tool-group
  - @/components/anchor-ui/ai/tooltip-icon-button
  - @/components/anchor-ui/badge
  - @/components/anchor-ui
  - @/components/anchor-ui/button
  - @/components/anchor-ui/checkbox
  - @/components/anchor-ui/DataTable
  - @/components/anchor-ui/input

## Forbidden (native HTML)
- Do not use <div> — Do not hand-build chat containers (div+input+message list) instead of using the Thread component; use instead: @/components/anchor-ui/ai/thread
- Do not use <button> — Raw <button> is forbidden to ensure consistent border-radius, spacing, and brand colors; use instead: @/components/anchor-ui/button
- Do not use <table> — Business lists must use DataTable to ensure consistent spacing and brand compliance; use instead: @/components/anchor-ui/DataTable
- Do not use <input> — Raw <input> is forbidden to ensure consistent height, border, and focus styles; use instead: @/components/anchor-ui/input

## Style Lock (blocklist approach)
- Do not add arbitrary-value spacing classes (e.g. `m-[13px]`, `p-[7px]`) to tables/buttons in business pages.
- Do not override the following semantics via className (declared in Design-anchor styleLock):
### Accordion (accordion)
- Do not override transition animations — pattern: `^(transition-|duration-|data-)`
### AlertDialog (alert-dialog)
- Do not override z-index positioning — pattern: `^(z-|fixed|absolute|inset)`
- Do not override animations (controlled internally) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
### Alert (alert)
- Do not override padding and border-radius — pattern: `^(p-|px-|py-|rounded)`
- Do not override semantic colors (controlled by variant) — pattern: `^(bg|text|border)-(primary|secondary|destructive|accent)`
### AspectRatio (aspect-ratio)
- Do not override overflow and positioning — pattern: `^(overflow|position|relative|absolute)`
### AssistantModal (aui-assistant-modal)
- Do not override positioning and z-index — pattern: `^(z-|fixed|absolute|inset|end-|bottom-)`
- Do not override popup dimensions — pattern: `^(h-|w-|max-h-|max-w-)`
- Do not override animations — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-|data-\[state)`
- Do not override popup background and border — pattern: `^(bg|border)-(popover|border|background)`
### AssistantSidebar (aui-assistant-sidebar)
- Do not override layout structure (flex split controlled internally) — pattern: `^(flex|grid|gap-|items-|justify-)`
- Do not override separator and drag behavior — pattern: `^(cursor|resize)`
- Do not override container height — pattern: `^h-`
### Attachment (aui-attachment)
- Do not override attachment container radius and border — pattern: `^(rounded|border)`
- Do not override attachment thumbnail size — pattern: `^(h-|w-|size-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(muted|card|background) — pattern: `^bg-(muted|card|background)`
### FollowUpSuggestions (aui-follow-up-suggestions)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^rounded — pattern: `^rounded`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text|border)-(muted|accent|background) — pattern: `^(bg|text|border)-(muted|accent|background)`
- Do not override animations — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-)`
### MarkdownText (aui-markdown-text)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(prose|leading-|tracking-) — pattern: `^(prose|leading-|tracking-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^font-(mono|sans|serif) — pattern: `^font-(mono|sans|serif)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(muted|zinc|gray|slate) — pattern: `^bg-(muted|zinc|gray|slate)`
### ModelSelector (aui-model-selector)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(z-|fixed|absolute) — pattern: `^(z-|fixed|absolute)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(h-|px-|py-) — pattern: `^(h-|px-|py-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|border)-(popover|input|background) — pattern: `^(bg|border)-(popover|input|background)`
### Reasoning (aui-reasoning)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(animate-|transition-|duration-) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(rounded|border) — pattern: `^(rounded|border)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(muted|secondary|accent|background) — pattern: `^bg-(muted|secondary|accent|background)`
### ThreadList (aui-thread-list)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(rounded|gap-) — pattern: `^(rounded|gap-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text)-(muted|accent|destructive|popover) — pattern: `^(bg|text)-(muted|accent|destructive|popover)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(z-|fixed|absolute) — pattern: `^(z-|fixed|absolute)`
### Thread (aui-thread)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^overflow — pattern: `^overflow`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(animate-|transition-|duration-) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(background|popover|accent|muted|primary|secondary) — pattern: `^bg-(background|popover|accent|muted|primary|secondary)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^h- — pattern: `^h-`
### ToolFallback (aui-tool-fallback)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(animate-|transition-|duration-) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^font-(mono|sans|serif) — pattern: `^font-(mono|sans|serif)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text|border)-(destructive|primary|muted) — pattern: `^(bg|text|border)-(destructive|primary|muted)`
### ToolGroup (aui-tool-group)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(animate-|transition-|duration-) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(rounded|border) — pattern: `^(rounded|border)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(muted|secondary|accent) — pattern: `^bg-(muted|secondary|accent)`
### TooltipIconButton (aui-tooltip-icon-button)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(h-|w-|size-|p-|px-|py-) — pattern: `^(h-|w-|size-|p-|px-|py-)`

- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(flex|grid|gap-|items-|justify-) — pattern: `^(flex|grid|gap-|items-|justify-)`
### ButtonGroup (button-group)

### Button (button)
- Do not override button height and padding (mapped by size) — pattern: `^(h-|px-|py-|p-|pt-|pb-|pl-|pr-)`
- Do not override border-radius (driven by design token --radius) — pattern: `^rounded`
- Do not override brand/semantic colors (mapped by variant) — pattern: `^(bg|text|border)-(primary|secondary|destructive|accent|muted)`

### Calendar (calendar)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(ring-|outline-) — pattern: `^(ring-|outline-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^h- — pattern: `^h-`
### Card (card)
- Do not override card radius and shadow — pattern: `^(rounded|shadow)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(card|background|primary|secondary) — pattern: `^bg-(card|background|primary|secondary)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(p-|px-|py-|pt-|pb-) — pattern: `^(p-|px-|py-|pt-|pb-)`
### Carousel (carousel)

### Checkbox (checkbox)

- Do not override styles matching pattern ^accent- — pattern: `^accent-`
- Do not use arbitrary spacing values — pattern: `^(m|p|gap)-\[`

### Command (command)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(ring-|outline-) — pattern: `^(ring-|outline-)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^h- — pattern: `^h-`
### ContextMenu (context-menu)
- Do not override z-index positioning — pattern: `^(z-|fixed|absolute|inset)`
- Do not override animations (controlled internally) — pattern: `^(animate-|transition-|duration-)`
### DataTable (data-table)
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(p|px|py|pt|pb|pl|pr)- — pattern: `^(p|px|py|pt|pb|pl|pr)-`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(border|rounded|ring|outline|divide)- — pattern: `^(border|rounded|ring|outline|divide)-`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text|border)-(primary|secondary|destructive|accent|muted|card|popover) — pattern: `^(bg|text|border)-(primary|secondary|destructive|accent|muted|card|popover)`
- Do not override styles matching pattern ^(m|p|gap|space-[xy])-\[ — pattern: `^(m|p|gap|space-[xy])-\[`

## Component Intent & Spec
### Accordion
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/accordion`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Accordion`, `AccordionItem`, `AccordionHeader`, `AccordionTrigger`, `AccordionContent`
- **Intent**: Collapsible content panels for FAQ, settings groups, and progressive disclosure.
- **Spec directive**: Use Accordion from @/components/anchor-ui for progressive disclosure (FAQ, settings groups, expandable lists). Always wrap items in <Accordion type="single" collapsible> or type="multiple". Each item needs AccordionItem + AccordionTrigger + AccordionContent. Don't replace with raw <details>/<summary> — those break consistent transition timing and focus management.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **FAQ — single-open collapsible**
  ```tsx
  <Accordion type="single" collapsible>
    <AccordionItem value="q1">
      <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>Yes. Follows WAI-ARIA disclosure pattern.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem value="q2">
      <AccordionTrigger>Is it animated?</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>Yes, smooth height transition.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
  ```
  - **Multi-open settings groups**
  ```tsx
  <Accordion type="multiple" defaultValue={["general"]}>
    <AccordionItem value="general">
      <AccordionTrigger>General</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>...</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem value="advanced">
      <AccordionTrigger>Advanced</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>...</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
  ```
### AlertDialog
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/alert-dialog`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `AlertDialog`, `AlertDialogPortal`, `AlertDialogOverlay`, `AlertDialogTrigger`, `AlertDialogContent`, `AlertDialogHeader`, `AlertDialogFooter`, `AlertDialogTitle`, `AlertDialogDescription`, `AlertDialogAction`, `AlertDialogCancel`
- **Intent**: Blocking confirmation dialog for irreversible actions (delete, submit). User must respond before continuing.
- **Spec directive**: Use AlertDialog from @/components/anchor-ui for blocking confirmation of irreversible actions (delete / discard / submit). Required structure: AlertDialog > AlertDialogTrigger (asChild Button) + AlertDialogContent > AlertDialogHeader (Title + Description) + AlertDialogFooter (Cancel + Action). Use Dialog (not AlertDialog) for non-blocking form modals. Action button should be destructive variant when the operation is destructive.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Destructive — delete confirmation**
  ```tsx
  <AlertDialog>
    <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="destructive">Delete account</Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Delete this account?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>This cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction onClick={onDelete}>Delete</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
  ```
  - **Controlled open**
  ```tsx
  <AlertDialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Unsaved changes</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>Discard your edits?</AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Keep editing</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Discard</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
  ```
### Alert
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/alert`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Alert`, `AlertTitle`, `AlertDescription`
- **Intent**: Displays important status feedback (success, warning, error) with optional title and description.
- **Spec directive**: Use Alert from @/components/anchor-ui for inline status feedback (success info, warnings, errors). Compose with AlertTitle + AlertDescription. Use variant="destructive" for errors. For blocking/confirm prompts use AlertDialog instead. Do not build banners with raw <div className="border bg-red-100">.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Info alert with title + description**
  ```tsx
  <Alert>
    <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>You can change your preferences in Settings.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
  ```
  - **Destructive — failed action**
  ```tsx
  <Alert variant="destructive">
    <AlertTitle>Save failed</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Check your network and try again.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
  ```
  - **Title-only short notice**
  ```tsx
  <Alert>
    <AlertTitle>Draft saved.</AlertTitle>
  </Alert>
  ```
### AspectRatio
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/aspect-ratio`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `AspectRatio`
- **Intent**: Fixed aspect-ratio container for images, videos, maps, and other media that must maintain proportions.
- **Spec directive**: Use AspectRatio from @/components/anchor-ui whenever an image / video / iframe / chart needs to keep its proportions while the container resizes. Pass `ratio` as a number (width ÷ height). Don't reach for `aspect-[16/9]` arbitrary Tailwind on a raw div — it works but loses the design-system anchor.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **16:9 video / hero image**
  ```tsx
  <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}>
    <img src={src} alt="" className="h-full w-full rounded-md object-cover" />
  </AspectRatio>
  ```
  - **1:1 square thumbnail**
  ```tsx
  <AspectRatio ratio={1}>
    <img src={avatar} alt="" className="h-full w-full object-cover" />
  </AspectRatio>
  ```
  - **4:3 embedded iframe**
  ```tsx
  <AspectRatio ratio={4 / 3}>
    <iframe src={url} className="h-full w-full rounded-md border" />
  </AspectRatio>
  ```
### AssistantModal
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/assistant-modal`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `AssistantModal`
- **Intent**: Floating AI assistant modal. Shows a trigger button (bottom-right) that opens a full Thread dialog. Use when embedding AI assistant on any page.
- **Spec directive**: Use AssistantModal from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Floating Corner Assistant**
  ```tsx
  <AssistantRuntimeProvider runtime={runtime}>
    <YourPageContent />
    <AssistantModal />
  </AssistantRuntimeProvider>
  ```
### AssistantSidebar
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/assistant-sidebar`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `AssistantSidebar`
- **Intent**: Sidebar AI assistant layout. Splits page into main content and AI conversation sidebar with a draggable divider. For workspace scenarios needing AI assistance.
- **Spec directive**: Use AssistantSidebar from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Workspace Layout**
  ```tsx
  <AssistantRuntimeProvider runtime={runtime}>
    <AssistantSidebar>
      <YourWorkspaceContent />
    </AssistantSidebar>
  </AssistantRuntimeProvider>
  ```
### Attachment
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/attachment`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `UserMessageAttachments`, `ComposerAttachments`, `ComposerAddAttachment`
- **Intent**: Attachment display and upload for AI conversations. Includes message attachment previews, input attachment list, and add-attachment button.
- **Spec directive**: Use Attachment from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### FollowUpSuggestions
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/follow-up-suggestions`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ThreadFollowupSuggestions`
- **Intent**: Follow-up suggestion buttons after AI replies. Displays clickable next-question suggestions below assistant messages.
- **Spec directive**: Use FollowUpSuggestions from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### MarkdownText
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/markdown-text`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `MarkdownText`
- **Intent**: Markdown renderer for AI messages. Renders AI-returned Markdown as formatted HTML (headings, lists, code blocks, tables, links).
- **Spec directive**: Use MarkdownText from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Standalone Usage (outside Thread)**
  ```tsx
  import { MarkdownText } from '@/components/anchor-ui/ai/markdown-text';
  
  <MarkdownText />
  ```
### ModelSelector
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/model-selector`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ModelSelector`, `ModelSelectorRoot`, `ModelSelectorTrigger`, `ModelSelectorContent`, `ModelSelectorItem`, `ModelSelectorValue`
- **Intent**: AI model selector dropdown. Lets users switch the current conversation's AI model with icons, descriptions, and disabled states.
- **Spec directive**: Use ModelSelector from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Simple Model Selector**
  ```tsx
  const models = [
    { id: "gpt-4", name: "GPT-4", description: "Most capable" },
    { id: "gpt-3.5", name: "GPT-3.5", description: "Fast" },
  ];
  
  <ModelSelector models={models} variant="outline" />
  ```
  - **Controlled Model Selector**
  ```tsx
  <ModelSelector
    models={models}
    value={selectedModel}
    onValueChange={setSelectedModel}
    variant="ghost"
    size="sm"
  />
  ```
### Reasoning
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/reasoning`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Reasoning`, `ReasoningRoot`, `ReasoningGroup`, `ReasoningTrigger`, `ReasoningContent`, `ReasoningText`, `ReasoningFade`
- **Intent**: AI reasoning/chain-of-thought display. Collapsible panel showing AI thinking process with outline/ghost/muted visual variants.
- **Spec directive**: Use Reasoning from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Show Reasoning Process**
  ```tsx
  <ReasoningRoot variant="outline" defaultOpen={isStreaming}>
    <ReasoningTrigger active={isStreaming} />
    <ReasoningContent>
      <ReasoningText>{children}</ReasoningText>
    </ReasoningContent>
  </ReasoningRoot>
  ```
### ThreadList
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/thread-list`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ThreadList`
- **Intent**: AI conversation history list showing multiple threads. Supports create, archive, and delete operations.
- **Spec directive**: Use ThreadList from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Sidebar + Thread List**
  ```tsx
  <div className="flex h-full">
    <aside className="w-64 border-r p-2">
      <ThreadList />
    </aside>
    <main className="flex-1">
      <Thread />
    </main>
  </div>
  ```
### Thread
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/thread`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Thread`
- **Intent**: AI conversation thread container with message list, welcome screen, Composer input, and scroll control. Core assistant-ui component.
- **Spec directive**: Use Thread from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Basic AI Conversation**
  ```tsx
  <AssistantRuntimeProvider runtime={runtime}>
    <Thread />
  </AssistantRuntimeProvider>
  ```
### ToolFallback
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/tool-fallback`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ToolFallback`, `ToolFallbackRoot`, `ToolFallbackTrigger`, `ToolFallbackContent`, `ToolFallbackArgs`, `ToolFallbackResult`, `ToolFallbackError`
- **Intent**: AI tool call display. Shows a single tool invocation's name, status (running/complete/incomplete), arguments, and result.
- **Spec directive**: Use ToolFallback from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Single Tool Call Display**
  ```tsx
  <ToolFallback
    toolName="search_web"
    argsText='{"query": "latest news"}'
    result="Found 5 results..."
    status={{ type: "complete" }}
  />
  ```
### ToolGroup
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/tool-group`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ToolGroup`, `ToolGroupRoot`, `ToolGroupTrigger`, `ToolGroupContent`
- **Intent**: AI tool call group container. Aggregates multiple ToolFallback items in a collapsible panel with call count and active state.
- **Spec directive**: Use ToolGroup from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Grouped Tool Calls**
  ```tsx
  <ToolGroupRoot variant="outline">
    <ToolGroupTrigger count={3} active={isRunning} />
    <ToolGroupContent>
      {toolCalls.map(tc => <ToolFallback key={tc.id} {...tc} />)}
    </ToolGroupContent>
  </ToolGroupRoot>
  ```
### TooltipIconButton
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/ai/tooltip-icon-button`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `TooltipIconButton`
- **Intent**: Icon button with tooltip. For AI interface action buttons (copy, edit, retry) that show text on hover.
- **Spec directive**: Use TooltipIconButton from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Copy Button**
  ```tsx
  <TooltipIconButton tooltip="Copy" variant="ghost">
    <CopyIcon />
  </TooltipIconButton>
  ```
### Avatar
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/avatar`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Avatar`, `AvatarImage`, `AvatarFallback`
- **Intent**: User avatar with image loading and text fallback. Used in user lists, comments, and navigation bars.
- **Spec directive**: Use Avatar from @/components/anchor-ui for user / profile representations. Always pair AvatarImage with AvatarFallback — the fallback renders while the image loads and if it fails. Fallback should be initials (1–2 chars) or an icon, never long text. Avoid stacking `bg-*` arbitrary colors; the Radix Avatar primitive handles fallback styling.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Image with text fallback**
  ```tsx
  <Avatar>
    <AvatarImage src={user.avatarUrl} alt={user.name} />
    <AvatarFallback>{user.initials}</AvatarFallback>
  </Avatar>
  ```
  - **Fallback only — initials**
  ```tsx
  <Avatar>
    <AvatarFallback>SC</AvatarFallback>
  </Avatar>
  ```
  - **Stacked avatar group**
  ```tsx
  <div className="flex -space-x-2">
    {team.map((u) => (
      <Avatar key={u.id} className="ring-2 ring-background">
        <AvatarImage src={u.avatarUrl} />
        <AvatarFallback>{u.initials}</AvatarFallback>
      </Avatar>
    ))}
  </div>
  ```
### Badge
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/badge`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Badge`
- **Intent**: Unified entry for status marks, labels, and count bubbles. Do not hand-build span+bg alternatives.
- **Spec directive**: Use Badge from @/components/anchor-ui for status labels, count chips, and inline tags. Pick variant by intent: default=primary highlight, secondary=neutral marker, destructive=error/warning state, outline=quiet emphasis. Don't hand-roll `<span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 rounded">` — it bypasses the variant contract and ages into visual drift.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Status variants**
  ```tsx
  <div className="flex gap-2">
    <Badge>Active</Badge>
    <Badge variant="secondary">Draft</Badge>
    <Badge variant="destructive">Expired</Badge>
    <Badge variant="outline">Optional</Badge>
  </div>
  ```
  - **Count bubble next to a label**
  ```tsx
  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2">
    Notifications
    <Badge variant="secondary">12</Badge>
  </span>
  ```
  - **Inline tags in a list item**
  ```tsx
  <Item>
    <ItemContent>
      <ItemTitle>Q4 roadmap</ItemTitle>
      <ItemDescription>
        <Badge variant="outline">draft</Badge> <Badge>in review</Badge>
      </ItemDescription>
    </ItemContent>
  </Item>
  ```
### Breadcrumb
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/breadcrumb`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Breadcrumb`, `BreadcrumbList`, `BreadcrumbItem`, `BreadcrumbLink`, `BreadcrumbPage`, `BreadcrumbSeparator`, `BreadcrumbEllipsis`
- **Intent**: Hierarchical breadcrumb navigation showing current page position in site structure with back navigation.
- **Spec directive**: Use Breadcrumb from @/components/anchor-ui for showing the current location inside a navigable hierarchy. Structure: Breadcrumb > BreadcrumbList > (BreadcrumbItem > BreadcrumbLink/Page) [+ BreadcrumbSeparator between each]. The current page should be a BreadcrumbPage (no link). Use BreadcrumbEllipsis when the path is long enough to need collapsing. Skip for single-level pages — breadcrumbs add noise when there's no hierarchy.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Standard 3-level breadcrumb**
  ```tsx
  <Breadcrumb>
    <BreadcrumbList>
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/components">Components</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>Button</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
    </BreadcrumbList>
  </Breadcrumb>
  ```
  - **Collapsed path with ellipsis**
  ```tsx
  <Breadcrumb>
    <BreadcrumbList>
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbEllipsis /></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>Settings</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
    </BreadcrumbList>
  </Breadcrumb>
  ```
### ButtonGroup
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/button-group`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ButtonGroup`, `ButtonGroupSeparator`, `ButtonGroupText`
- **Intent**: Button group container that visually combines related action buttons (toolbars, segmented controls).
- **Spec directive**: Use ButtonGroup from @/components/anchor-ui to visually glue related buttons together (toolbars, segmented controls, split actions). Children should be Buttons of the same size + variant. Internal corners flatten automatically — don't manually `rounded-none` the buttons. Use ButtonGroupSeparator between visually distinct subgroups; ButtonGroupText for inline non-clickable labels.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Toolbar — 3-button group**
  ```tsx
  <ButtonGroup>
    <Button variant="outline"><BoldIcon /></Button>
    <Button variant="outline"><ItalicIcon /></Button>
    <Button variant="outline"><UnderlineIcon /></Button>
  </ButtonGroup>
  ```
  - **Split action — label + dropdown**
  ```tsx
  <ButtonGroup>
    <Button>Save</Button>
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="default" size="icon"><ChevronDownIcon /></Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
        <DropdownMenuItem>Save as draft</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Save and publish</DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </ButtonGroup>
  ```
### Button
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/button`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Button`
- **Intent**: Unified clickable action entry for primary, secondary, and link navigation actions. Raw <button> with manual spacing and brand colors is forbidden.
- **Spec directive**: Always use Button from @/components/anchor-ui/button — never raw <button>. Pick variant by intent: default=primary CTA, secondary=neutral action, outline=secondary CTA on a busy surface, ghost=low-emphasis (toolbar / row action), link=inline text action, destructive=delete/cancel. Pick size by context: default=most use, sm=table rows / tight toolbars, lg=hero CTAs, icon=icon-only square. Use asChild to render as another element (e.g., a Next.js Link) while keeping all Button styles. Don't stack `className="bg-blue-500 text-white px-3"` — that bypasses variant + size and causes drift.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Primary CTA**
  ```tsx
  <Button onClick={onSubmit}>Save changes</Button>
  ```
  - **Variants side-by-side**
  ```tsx
  <div className="flex gap-2">
    <Button>Default</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Secondary</Button>
    <Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
    <Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
    <Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
  </div>
  ```
  - **Icon-only button**
  ```tsx
  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" aria-label="Settings">
    <SettingsIcon />
  </Button>
  ```
  - **asChild — render as a Link**
  ```tsx
  <Button asChild variant="outline">
    <a href="/docs">Read docs</a>
  </Button>
  ```
### Calendar
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/calendar`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Calendar`, `CalendarDayButton`
- **Intent**: Date picker calendar panel. Core rendering layer for date range selectors.
- **Spec directive**: Use Calendar from @/components/anchor-ui for picking a date or date range (single dates, ranges, multi-date). Inline placement only — for popover-style date inputs, wrap Calendar in a Popover. Pass `mode="single" | "range" | "multiple"`. Use `selected` + `onSelect` for controlled state. Don't replace with a raw <input type="date"> in product UIs — that loses cross-browser style consistency.
- **Few-shot examples** (prefer mimicking structure & imports):
  - **Single-date picker**
  ```tsx
  const [date, setDate] = React.useState<Date | undefined>();
  <Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
  ```
  - **Date-range picker**
  ```tsx
  const [range, setRange] = React.useState<DateRange | undefined>();
  <Calendar mode="range" selected={range} onSelect={setRange} numberOfMonths={2} />
  ```
  - **Wrapped inside a Popover**
  ```tsx
  <Popover>
    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="outline">{date ? format(date, "PPP") : "Pick a date"}</Button>
    </PopoverTrigger>
    <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
      <Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} initialFocus />
    </PopoverContent>
  </Popover>
  ```
### Card
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/card`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`
- **Intent**: General content container for grouped information display. Supports title, description, body, and footer actions.
- **Spec directive**: Use Card from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Carousel
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/carousel`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Carousel`, `CarouselContent`, `CarouselItem`, `CarouselPrevious`, `CarouselNext`
- **Intent**: Carousel/slider container for product images, banners, and horizontal card scrolling.
- **Spec directive**: Use Carousel from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Checkbox
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/checkbox`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Checkbox`, `CheckboxIndicator`
- **Intent**: Unified check/uncheck entry for form agreements, multi-select filters, and batch selection. Raw <input type=checkbox> is forbidden.
- **Spec directive**: Must use @/components/anchor-ui/checkbox. Do not hand-write alternatives.
### Collapsible
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/collapsible`

- **Intent**: Single collapsible region. Lighter than Accordion — for standalone expand/collapse scenarios.
- **Spec directive**: Use Collapsible from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Command
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/command`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Command`, `CommandDialog`, `CommandInput`, `CommandList`, `CommandEmpty`, `CommandGroup`, `CommandItem`, `CommandShortcut`, `CommandSeparator`
- **Intent**: Command palette (VS Code Ctrl+K / Spotlight style) for global search and quick action entry.
- **Spec directive**: Use Command from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.

- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/context-menu`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ContextMenu`, `ContextMenuTrigger`, `ContextMenuContent`, `ContextMenuItem`, `ContextMenuCheckboxItem`, `ContextMenuRadioItem`, `ContextMenuLabel`, `ContextMenuSeparator`, `ContextMenuShortcut`, `ContextMenuGroup`, `ContextMenuPortal`, `ContextMenuSub`, `ContextMenuSubContent`, `ContextMenuSubTrigger`, `ContextMenuRadioGroup`, `ContextMenuArrow`, `ContextMenuItemIndicator`
- **Intent**: Right-click context menu providing contextual actions for selected content.
- **Spec directive**: Use ContextMenu from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.

- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/DataTable`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `DataTable`, `CompositeDataTable`
- **Intent**: Primary business data table: pagination, sorting, bulk actions converge here. Raw <table> with arbitrary spacing is forbidden.
- **Spec directive**: Use DataTable from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Dialog
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/dialog`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Dialog`, `DialogTrigger`, `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogFooter`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`, `DialogClose`
- **Intent**: Modal dialog for user confirmation or input. Blocks background interaction, supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.
- **Spec directive**: Use Dialog from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Drawer
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/drawer`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Drawer`, `DrawerPortal`, `DrawerOverlay`, `DrawerTrigger`, `DrawerClose`, `DrawerContent`, `DrawerHeader`, `DrawerFooter`, `DrawerTitle`, `DrawerDescription`
- **Intent**: Bottom/side drawer panel for mobile action sheets or auxiliary content display.
- **Spec directive**: Use Drawer from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### DropdownMenu
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/dropdown-menu`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `DropdownMenu`, `DropdownMenuTrigger`, `DropdownMenuContent`, `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`, `DropdownMenuRadioItem`, `DropdownMenuLabel`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuShortcut`, `DropdownMenuGroup`, `DropdownMenuPortal`, `DropdownMenuSub`, `DropdownMenuSubContent`, `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`, `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`, `DropdownMenuArrow`, `DropdownMenuItemIndicator`
- **Intent**: Dropdown menu for action lists below a trigger button. For 'more actions', bulk operations, etc.
- **Spec directive**: Use DropdownMenu from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Empty
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/empty`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Empty`, `EmptyHeader`, `EmptyTitle`, `EmptyDescription`, `EmptyContent`, `EmptyMedia`
- **Intent**: Empty state placeholder for lists/pages with no data. Shows explanatory text and guidance actions.
- **Spec directive**: Use Empty from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Field
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/field`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Field`, `FieldLabel`, `FieldDescription`, `FieldError`, `FieldGroup`, `FieldLegend`, `FieldSeparator`, `FieldSet`, `FieldContent`, `FieldTitle`
- **Intent**: Form field container unifying label + input + description + error layout with accessibility bindings.
- **Spec directive**: Use Field from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### HoverCard
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/hover-card`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `HoverCard`, `HoverCardTrigger`, `HoverCardPortal`, `HoverCardArrow`, `HoverCardContent`
- **Intent**: Hover card showing extra preview info (user profiles, link previews) on mouse hover.
- **Spec directive**: Use HoverCard from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### InputGroup
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/input-group`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `InputGroup`, `InputGroupAddon`, `InputGroupButton`, `InputGroupText`, `InputGroupInput`, `InputGroupTextarea`
- **Intent**: Input group container combining prefix/suffix (icons, text, buttons) with input as a visual unit.
- **Spec directive**: Use InputGroup from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### InputOtp
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/input-otp`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `InputOTP`, `InputOTPGroup`, `InputOTPSlot`, `InputOTPSeparator`
- **Intent**: One-time password input (OTP/verification code) with fixed-digit segmented fields.
- **Spec directive**: Use InputOtp from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Input
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/input`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Input`
- **Intent**: Unified text input entry for search, form fields, passwords, etc. Raw <input> with manual spacing and borders is forbidden.
- **Spec directive**: Must use @/components/anchor-ui/input. Do not stack Tailwind overrides on JSX.
### Item
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/item`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Item`, `ItemMedia`, `ItemContent`, `ItemActions`, `ItemGroup`, `ItemSeparator`, `ItemTitle`, `ItemDescription`, `ItemHeader`, `ItemFooter`
- **Intent**: List item layout providing icon/media + text + action button standard row structure.
- **Spec directive**: Use Item from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Kbd
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/kbd`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Kbd`, `KbdGroup`
- **Intent**: Keyboard shortcut label displaying key combinations (e.g., Ctrl+S) with visual styling.
- **Spec directive**: Use Kbd from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Label
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/label`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Label`
- **Intent**: Form label paired with Input/Select controls. Provides consistent font styling and disabled state association.
- **Spec directive**: Use Label from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Menubar
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/menubar`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Menubar`, `MenubarMenu`, `MenubarTrigger`, `MenubarContent`, `MenubarItem`, `MenubarSeparator`, `MenubarLabel`, `MenubarCheckboxItem`, `MenubarRadioGroup`, `MenubarRadioItem`, `MenubarPortal`, `MenubarSubContent`, `MenubarSubTrigger`, `MenubarGroup`, `MenubarSub`, `MenubarShortcut`, `MenubarArrow`, `MenubarItemIndicator`
- **Intent**: Menu bar (desktop app-style top menu) with multiple dropdown menus side by side.
- **Spec directive**: Use Menubar from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### NavigationMenu
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/navigation-menu`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `NavigationMenu`, `NavigationMenuList`, `NavigationMenuItem`, `NavigationMenuContent`, `NavigationMenuTrigger`, `NavigationMenuLink`, `NavigationMenuIndicator`, `NavigationMenuViewport`
- **Intent**: Top navigation menu supporting simple link lists or complex dropdown panel navigation.
- **Spec directive**: Use NavigationMenu from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Pagination
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/pagination`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Pagination`, `PaginationContent`, `PaginationEllipsis`, `PaginationItem`, `PaginationLink`, `PaginationNext`, `PaginationPrevious`
- **Intent**: Pagination controls providing page number jumps and previous/next page navigation.
- **Spec directive**: Use Pagination from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Popover
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/popover`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Popover`, `PopoverTrigger`, `PopoverAnchor`, `PopoverPortal`, `PopoverClose`, `PopoverArrow`, `PopoverContent`
- **Intent**: Popover bubble for showing extra content or lightweight interactions near a trigger. Auto-closes on outside click.
- **Spec directive**: Use Popover from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Progress
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/progress`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Progress`, `ProgressIndicator`
- **Intent**: Progress bar showing task completion percentage. Supports custom max value and accessibility attributes.
- **Spec directive**: Use Progress from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### RadioGroup
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/radio-group`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `RadioGroup`, `RadioGroupItem`, `RadioGroupIndicator`
- **Intent**: Radio button group for selecting one option from mutually exclusive choices. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.
- **Spec directive**: Use RadioGroup from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Resizable
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/resizable`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ResizablePanelGroup`, `ResizablePanel`, `ResizableHandle`
- **Intent**: Draggable resizable panel group for IDE-style multi-panel layouts.
- **Spec directive**: Use Resizable from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### ScrollArea
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/scroll-area`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ScrollArea`, `ScrollBar`, `ScrollAreaViewport`, `ScrollAreaCorner`, `ScrollAreaThumb`, `ScrollAreaScrollbar`
- **Intent**: Custom scroll area container with constrained height and consistent scrollbar behavior.
- **Spec directive**: Use ScrollArea from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Select
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/select`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Select`, `SelectGroup`, `SelectValue`, `SelectTrigger`, `SelectContent`, `SelectLabel`, `SelectItem`, `SelectSeparator`, `SelectScrollUpButton`, `SelectScrollDownButton`, `SelectPortal`, `SelectIcon`, `SelectViewport`, `SelectItemText`, `SelectItemIndicator`, `SelectArrow`
- **Intent**: Dropdown select with unified border and interaction styles. For simple options; wrap externally for async/complex cases.
- **Spec directive**: Use Select from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Separator
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/separator`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Separator`
- **Intent**: Visual separator between content areas. Supports horizontal and vertical directions.
- **Spec directive**: Use Separator from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Sheet
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/sheet`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Sheet`, `SheetPortal`, `SheetOverlay`, `SheetTrigger`, `SheetClose`, `SheetContent`, `SheetHeader`, `SheetFooter`, `SheetTitle`, `SheetDescription`
- **Intent**: Slide-out panel (mobile drawer style, supports all 4 directions) for settings panels and detail views.
- **Spec directive**: Use Sheet from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Sidebar
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/sidebar`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Sidebar`, `SidebarContent`, `SidebarFooter`, `SidebarGroup`, `SidebarGroupAction`, `SidebarGroupContent`, `SidebarGroupLabel`, `SidebarHeader`, `SidebarInput`, `SidebarInset`, `SidebarMenu`, `SidebarMenuAction`, `SidebarMenuBadge`, `SidebarMenuButton`, `SidebarMenuItem`, `SidebarMenuSkeleton`, `SidebarMenuSub`, `SidebarMenuSubButton`, `SidebarMenuSubItem`, `SidebarProvider`, `SidebarRail`, `SidebarSeparator`, `SidebarTrigger`
- **Intent**: Application sidebar skeleton with header/content/footer/menu navigation layout.
- **Spec directive**: Use Sidebar from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Skeleton
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/skeleton`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Skeleton`
- **Intent**: Skeleton loading placeholder showing expected layout shape during content loading. Reduces page jank.
- **Spec directive**: Use Skeleton from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Slider
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/slider`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Slider`, `SliderTrack`, `SliderRange`, `SliderThumb`
- **Intent**: Slider control for selecting a value within a range. Based on native range input.
- **Spec directive**: Use Slider from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Sonner
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/sonner`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Toaster`
- **Intent**: Toast notifications (via sonner library) for lightweight action feedback (success/failure/info).
- **Spec directive**: Use Sonner from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Spinner
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/spinner`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Spinner`
- **Intent**: Loading spinner indicator for in-button, area, or full-screen loading states.
- **Spec directive**: Use Spinner from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Switch
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/switch`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Switch`, `SwitchThumb`
- **Intent**: Toggle switch for boolean value changes (enable/disable features). Accessible checkbox with visual track.
- **Spec directive**: Use Switch from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Table
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/table`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Table`, `TableHeader`, `TableBody`, `TableFooter`, `TableHead`, `TableRow`, `TableCell`, `TableCaption`
- **Intent**: Base data table layer providing semantic HTML table/thead/tbody/tr/th/td with consistent styling.
- **Spec directive**: Use Table from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Tabs
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/tabs`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`
- **Intent**: Tab component for switching between views/panels in the same area. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.
- **Spec directive**: Use Tabs from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Textarea
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/textarea`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Textarea`
- **Intent**: Multi-line text input for longer text entry. Unified border, border-radius, and focus styles.
- **Spec directive**: Use Textarea from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### ToggleGroup
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/toggle-group`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `ToggleGroup`, `ToggleGroupItem`
- **Intent**: Toggle button group — mutually exclusive or multi-select toggles (e.g., view modes: list/grid/board).
- **Spec directive**: Use ToggleGroup from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Toggle
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/toggle`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `Toggle`
- **Intent**: Toggle button (pressed/released state) for enabling/disabling features or view mode switching.
- **Spec directive**: Use Toggle from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
### Tooltip
- **Upstream module**: `@/components/anchor-ui/tooltip`
- **Sub-components (Spec)**: `TooltipProvider`, `Tooltip`, `TooltipTrigger`, `TooltipPortal`, `TooltipArrow`, `TooltipContent`
- **Intent**: Text tooltip bubble showing helper text on hover. Must not contain interactive content.
- **Spec directive**: Use Tooltip from @/components/anchor-ui. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.

## Correction Directives
- **no-manual-chat-ui**: if Violation: using raw tag or hand-built alternative → Replace with the proper component import and use semantic props for styling.
- **no-raw-button-tooltip-combo**: if Violation: using raw tag or hand-built alternative → Replace with the proper component import and use semantic props for styling.
- **no-raw-button**: if Using raw native  <button> → Replace with  import { Button } from '@/components/anchor-ui/Button', Use variant and size props for styling.
- **no-raw-table**: if Using raw native  <table> → Replace with the proper component import and use semantic props for styling.
- **no-hacky-spacing**: if Violation: using raw tag or hand-built alternative → Replace with the proper component import and use semantic props for styling.
- **no-raw-input**: if Using raw native  <input> → Replace with  import { Input } from '@/components/anchor-ui/Input'.

## Decorative/Animation Component Libraries (page embellishments)

The following third-party component libraries can be used as visual embellishments. Core interactions still use Design-anchor components (`@design` or `@/components/anchor-ui/*`); decorative components are for non-functional visual enhancement only.

**Usage guidelines**:
- When to use: When the page needs visual highlights / animation accents (Hero area, Landing Page, empty state, loading state, CTA area)
- Quantity control: Use at most 1-2 decorative components per page to avoid performance issues or visual fatigue from excessive animation
- Priority: Core interactive components still use @/components/anchor-ui/*; decorative components are only for non-functional visual enhancement
- Color constraints: Decorative components should use project design token colors (e.g. hsl(var(--primary))); avoid hard-coded color values

### Magic UI
- Docs: https://magicui.design
- Install: `npx magicui-cli@latest add <component-name>`
- Component directory: src/components/magicui/
- Runtime dependencies: motion
- Available components:
  - **text**: animated-shiny-text, number-ticker, sparkles-text, typing-animation, text-reveal, word-rotate, flip-text, gradual-spacing
  - **background**: particles, meteors, ripple, dot-pattern, grid-pattern, retro-grid
  - **layout**: bento-grid, dock, marquee, safari, iphone-15-pro
  - **card**: magic-card, neon-gradient-card, lens
  - **border**: border-beam, shimmer-button, shine-border, pulsating-button
  - **other**: animated-beam, globe, orbit, cool-mode, confetti, animated-list

### Aceternity UI
- Docs: https://ui.aceternity.com
- Install: `npx aceternity-ui@latest add <component-name>`
- Component directory: src/components/aceternity/
- Runtime dependencies: motion
- Available components:
  - **background**: aurora-background, background-beams, background-gradient, wavy-background, vortex, background-boxes
  - **text**: text-generate-effect, typewriter-effect, hero-highlight, flip-words, text-reveal-card
  - **card**: card-hover-effect, 3d-card-effect, direction-aware-hover, hover-border-gradient
  - **navigation**: floating-navbar
  - **border**: moving-border, glowing-stars
  - **layout**: infinite-moving-cards, lamp, spotlight, tracing-beam, parallax-scroll, sticky-scroll-reveal, images-slider
